apis.name: @ohos.abilityAccessCtrl (程序访问控制管理)
apis.purpose: Runtime permission checking, requesting, and management for applications

apis.name: ohos.permission.WRITE_IMAGEVIDEO (写入图片视频权限)
apis.purpose: Required permission for saving/creating image and video assets to the album via photoAccessHelper

apis.name: ohos.permission.READ_IMAGEVIDEO (读取图片视频权限)
apis.purpose: Required permission for reading image and video assets from the album via photoAccessHelper

apis.name: @ohos.app.ability.UIAbility (UIAbility生命周期)
apis.purpose: UI component lifecycle management including Create, Foreground, Background, Destroy with corresponding callbacks

notableFindings: WRITE_IMAGEVIDEO and READ_IMAGEVIDEO are user_grant type permissions; must be declared in module.json5 and requested at runtime via requestPermissionsFromUser
requestPermissionsFromUser can only be called once per permission; subsequent calls require requestPermissionOnSetting or openPermissionOnSetting
UIAbility.onCreate is synchronous (no async support) while onDestroy supports Promise-based async
Permissions type is imported from '@kit.AbilityKit' as a string union type
Through picker access to media files does not require READ_IMAGEVIDEO permission
getSelfPermissionStatus (API 20+) returns NOT_DETERMINED status before first runtime permission request, which is useful for showing permission rationale UI
